title: Testing & Faking
description: Developer tests AI-integrated code using fake gateways, spy gateways, and test helpers that simulate provider responses without real API calls.
use_cases: Prevent stray (un-faked) prompts with strict mode
Assert agent was prompted with specific content
Assert agent was never prompted / never queued
Simulate queued job dispatch without real queue (FakePendingDispatch)
Mock HTTP provider responses (fakeOpenAiResponse, fakeGroqResponse, etc.)

key_classes.name: FakeTextGateway
key_methods: generateText(TextProvider, model, instructions, messages, tools, schema, options, timeout): TextResponse
streamText(invocationId, TextProvider, model, instructions, messages, tools, schema, options, timeout): Generator
key_classes.key_behavior: Returns sequenced array or Closure-based fake responses. Auto-generates fake structured data for JSON schemas. Emits streaming events (StreamStart, TextStart, TextDelta, TextEnd, StreamEnd). Throws RuntimeException if prompt received without fake when preventStrayPrompts=true.

key_classes.name: FakeEmbeddingGateway
key_methods: generateEmbeddings(EmbeddingProvider, model, inputs[], dimensions, timeout): EmbeddingsResponse
key_classes.key_behavior: Returns sequenced or Closure-based fake embedding vectors. Auto-generates fake float vectors via Embeddings::fakeEmbedding(dimensions) when no response configured.

key_classes.name: FakeAudioGateway
key_methods: generateAudio(AudioProvider, model, text, voice, instructions, timeout): AudioResponse
key_classes.key_behavior: Returns base64-encoded fake audio content when no response configured.

key_classes.name: FakeImageGateway
key_methods: generateImage(ImageProvider, model, prompt, attachments, size, quality, timeout): ImageResponse
key_classes.key_behavior: Returns base64-encoded fake image content when no response configured.

key_classes.name: SpyOpenAiGateway
key_methods: client(Provider, ?int timeout): PendingRequest — captures timeout, delegates to parent
key_classes.key_behavior: Spy pattern: intercepts the HTTP client creation to record timeouts passed per invocation. Used to assert #[Timeout] attribute is respected through the tool loop.

key_classes.name: InteractsWithFakeAgents
key_classes.key_behavior: Records all AgentPrompt and QueuedAgentPrompt invocations per agent class. Provides PHPUnit assertion helpers wrapping Collection::contains/doesntContain/isEmpty.

key_classes.name: FakePendingDispatch
key_classes.key_behavior: No-op implementation of PendingDispatch for testing. All fluent methods (onConnection, onQueue, delay, chain, afterResponse, etc.) return $this without side effects. __destruct() is empty — prevents actual job dispatch. shouldDispatch() always returns true (safe no-op).

key_classes.name: AiManager
key_classes.key_behavior: Each fakeableXxxProvider() checks if that type is faked; if so, clones the real provider and injects the fake gateway via useXxxGateway().

functions: requiresApiKey(string ...$keys): void — skips test if env key missing
fakeOpenAiResponse(string text): PromiseInterface — mocks OpenAI Responses API HTTP reply
fakeAzureResponse(string text): PromiseInterface — mocks Azure OpenAI HTTP reply
fakeGroqResponse(string text): PromiseInterface — mocks Groq chat completion HTTP reply
fakeOllamaResponse(string text): PromiseInterface — mocks Ollama HTTP reply
fakeDeepSeekResponse(string text): PromiseInterface — mocks DeepSeek HTTP reply
fakeOpenRouterResponse(string text): PromiseInterface — mocks OpenRouter HTTP reply
fakeOpenRouterToolCallResponse(): PromiseInterface — mocks tool_calls finish_reason response
test_helpers.mechanism: All use Http::response() (Laravel HTTP fake) to intercept outgoing HTTP without real API calls.

custom_expectations: toBeValidAgentResponse(?provider): asserts text non-empty, steps non-empty, optional provider name
toContainStreamEventTypes(array eventClasses): asserts all listed event classes present in stream
toHaveUsage(promptTokens, completionTokens): asserts usage token counts match

key_relationships: AiManager uses 8 InteractsWith* traits (one per gateway type)
AiManager.fakeableXxxProvider() injects FakeXxxGateway into real provider clone
InteractsWithFakeAgents.fakeAgent() creates FakeTextGateway and registers by agent class
Helpers.php fake* functions use Laravel Http::response() to mock at HTTP layer

fake_response_patterns.array_sequence: Pass array of responses; currentResponseIndex increments per call
fake_response_patterns.auto_generate: If null response and preventStray=false: auto-generate fake string / fake embeddings / fake base64
fake_response_patterns.structured_schema: If schema provided and null response: generate_fake_data_for_json_schema_type(ObjectType)

important_notes: FakeTextGateway supports both generateText (sync) and streamText (yields fake streaming events word-by-word)
SpyOpenAiGateway and siblings (SpyAnthropic, SpyGroq, SpyGemini) are test-local classes defined inline in TimeoutInToolLoopTest.php
FakePendingDispatch prevents accidental job dispatch in tests — used when agents dispatch queued jobs
AiManager::purge() + extend() pattern used to inject spy gateways into real provider resolution
preventStrayPrompts/Embeddings/Audio/Images methods enable strict test mode (fail-fast on unexpected calls)
